channel.title: Nuuu Updates
channel.description: Signed updates for Nuuu for Mac.

item.title: 0.2.0-beta.6
item.description:
# Nuuu 0.2 Beta 6
This prerelease fixes Empty Trash for users whose Mac still denies direct access to `.Trash` even after Full Disk Access appears enabled.
- Keeps the safe direct FileManager empty-trash path as the first attempt. - Adds a Finder Empty Trash fallback when macOS denies direct Trash access, so Finder can surface any required system approval in front of the user. - Adds regression coverage for denied direct Trash access.
This testing build is Sparkle-signed but not Apple-notarized. macOS may display a security warning during installation.

item.title: 0.2.0-beta.4
item.description:
# Nuuu 0.2 Beta 4
This prerelease is for tester validation of the latest Nuuu fixes and polish.
- Adds privacy-first analytics, reliability telemetry, crash-reporting abstractions, privacy settings, and telemetry documentation. - Fixes app update publishing so users on older 0.2 builds can see the newest Sparkle update. - Improves large-file scanning, app cleanup loading, uninstall reliability, permission-focus behavior, and RAM optimization responsiveness. - Redesigns the Schedule section to match Nuuu styling and shows accurate last-run cleaned item and freed-space metrics. - Keeps telemetry privacy-first: no file names, paths, app names, assistant prompts, tokens, or cleanup contents are collected.
This testing build is Sparkle-signed but not Apple-notarized. macOS may display a security warning during installation.

item.title: 0.2.0-beta.3
item.description:
# Nuuu 0.2 Beta 3
This prerelease continues the 0.2 test cycle with the latest app polish and stability fixes from `main`.
It should be published with Sparkle build `4` so users on 0.2 Beta 2, build `3`, are offered the update instead of seeing "You're up to date."

# Nuuu 0.2 Beta 2
This prerelease contains the complete duplicate cleanup, scheduling, scan progress, notification, RAM reporting, and Sparkle update work now merged into Nuuu's `main` branch.
It also includes compatibility fixes for Quick Look thumbnails and notifications when building with Xcode 16.4.
This testing build is Sparkle-signed but not Apple-notarized. macOS may display a security warning during installation.
